About Our School

Where Islamic Values Meet
Modern Education

A unique institution combining early childhood care, Quranic sciences, and academic excellence — shaping well-rounded Muslim scholars since 2010.

2022EST. YEAR
🎯

Our Mission

To provide quality Islamic and academic education that builds strong character, Quranic knowledge, and academic excellence — empowering children to be productive Muslim citizens.

🌟

Our Vision

To be the leading Islamic educational institution in Somalia — producing graduates who are deeply rooted in their faith, academically equipped, and ready for the future.

📖

Our Values

Faith (Iman), Knowledge (Ilm), Respect (Ixtiraam), Excellence (Itqaan), and Community (Ummah) — five pillars guiding everything we do at X.D.S.S.

Our Programs

Two Pathways,
One Strong Foundation

From a child's earliest years through primary school graduation — every step guided with Islamic values and academic rigor.

🌱
Ages 2 – 5 years

Xanaano (Nursery)

A warm, safe, and nurturing environment where our youngest learners take their first steps in faith and learning. We build the foundation of Islamic character from day one.

What We Teach

🌙 Islamic Basics 📖 Short Surahs 🤲 Du'a & Adab 🔤 Arabic Letters 🎨 Creative Play 👫 Social Skills 🧮 Numbers & Shapes 📝 Early Literacy
🎓
Grades 1 – 8

Primary School (Ibtidaai)

Comprehensive Islamic and academic education. Our students memorize the Quran, master Arabic, and excel in core subjects — graduating as confident, faith-grounded scholars.

What We Teach

📚 Social 🕌 Islamic Studies 🌍 Arabic Language 🧮 Mathematics 🔬 Science 📝 Somali Language 🇬🇧 English 📖 Technology
Class of 2025

Our Quran Graduates

These 11 remarkable students have completed their Quranic memorization — a lifetime achievement we celebrate with immense pride.

School Gallery

Life at Daaru Saba

Moments of learning, achievement, and celebration from our vibrant school community.

Why Choose X.D.S.S

What Makes Us Different

01

Quran-First Approach

Every subject is taught through an Islamic lens. Our Hifdhul Quran program produces Huffadh who also excel academically.

02

Early Childhood Excellence

Nurturing children from age 2 — building Islamic character and academic readiness side by side from the very beginning.

03

Qualified & Caring Staff

Teachers who are mentors and role models — embodying the values they teach and giving every child personal attention.

04

Safe & Nurturing Environment

A secure, loving space where children feel comfortable to learn, ask questions, and grow spiritually and academically.

05

Proven Track Record

Years of producing Huffadh and top academic performers — our graduates go on to excel in secondary school and beyond.

06

Strong Parent Partnership

We maintain open communication with parents, celebrate milestones together, and make families part of every child's journey.

Ready to Enroll Your Child?

Give your child the foundation of Quranic knowledge and academic excellence. Admissions are open for both Xanaano and Primary School.

Apply Now — It's Free 📞 Call Us Today

Our team is ready to answer your questions and help your child begin their journey at Xanaanada Daaru Saba School.
